title: would changing from 1 byte prefix to 2

messages.author: CamFox
messages.text: their repeter, my repeter, my room server and companion all start "cb" so was wondering on the working of it all
messages.content_html: their repeter, my repeter, my room server and companion all start "cb" so was wondering on the working of it all

messages.author: Christopher A. Wichura
messages.text: Nothing to be concerned with. Message forwarding works regardless of prefix collisions. It only complicates things for us dumb humans wanting to visualize it on a map.
messages.content_html: Nothing to be concerned with. Message forwarding works regardless of prefix collisions. It only complicates things for us dumb humans wanting to visualize it on a map.
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: CamFox
messages.text: thanks for the advice, much appreciated
messages.content_html: thanks for the advice, much appreciated
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Christopher A. Wichura
messages.text: the real solution is mult-byte (though you can technically still have prefix collisions, but its way less probable). set your repeater to 3 byte now. If you know most of your area is on 1.14 or higher, you could also consider setting your companions to also use multibyte.
messages.content_html: the real solution is mult-byte (though you can technically still have prefix collisions, but its way less probable). set your repeater to 3 byte now. If you know most of your area is on 1.14 or higher, you could also consider setting your companions to also use multibyte.
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: CamFox
messages.text: will have a look into it
